key_facts: The SRV FPC VARINLINE® product offers a long, customizable insertion length.
The minimum insertion length for the sensor is 55.7 mm (2.19 inches).
Customers must specify the norm, size, and pressure rating for the flange/adapter.
Available VARINLINE® Process connections include F, N, and G.
The wetted surfaces of the sensor are constructed from Material 316L.
Rheonics specializes in inline process density and viscosity monitoring.
Contact information for Rheonics is provided, including websites and phone numbers for Switzerland and USA.
